use_codes.desc: TREATING OR CONTROLLING OCULAR INFLAMMATION WHICH COMPRISES TOPICALLY ADMINISTERING TO AFFECTED EYE A COMPOSITION COMPRISING AN NSAID, A POLYMERIC QUATERNARY AMMONIUM COMPOUND AND BORIC ACID
